title: Totally Not Sped Bananas
description: Part Of The Totally Not Sped Mod Thingy
body:
Do You Want Bananas? Do You Want A Dumb Mod That Is Worked On Very Little By Its Creators?

# WELL HERE IT IS!

## This Mod Features (So Far!):

Findable Bananas (in the jungle)

Banana weapons/tools

Other various banana themed items/blocks/features

Banana paintings

## Why Do You Want To Download This Mod You Say? 

1: Because!

2: Science Isnt About Why Its About Why NOT!]
